title: Ancient Egyptian trade
body: Ancient Egyptian trade developed with the gradual creation of land and sea trade routes connecting the ancient Egyptian civilization with ancient India, the Fertile Crescent, Arabia and Sub-Saharan Africa.
categories: All articles covered by WikiProject Wikify
Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify from April 2024
Articles with unsourced statements from February 2024
Wikipedia articles incorporating a citation from the 1911 Encyclopaedia Britannica with Wikisource reference
